creator: iedowse@maths.tcd.ie
text:
Adding to the audit trail.

In message <20020811172538.GA19081@magpie.csie.nctu.edu.tw>, Wei-Kai Wu writes:
>On Sun, Aug 11, 2002 at 10:04:23AM -0700, Ian Dowse wrote:
>> Synopsis: xonsole: couldn't open console
>> Is this problem still present?
>
>Ya. I have to kill xconsole and restart xconsole to let it work.
